name: trees
checklist: doc 13 M2 — walk to any tree, equip the axe, swing (attack) at the trunk: each hit flashes on the trunk and grants 1 wood.
The 3rd chop fells it: 'Timber!' notice, the static tree vanishes, and a bark-brown trunk topples AWAY from you, tumbling on slopes.
Open a second client: both see the same tree disappear and the same trunk pose, live and settled.
~30s after the trunk settles it despawns and drops 2 bonus wood where it came to REST (loot it).
Rejoin (or restart the preview after a save): the felled tree is STILL gone — fells persist with the world.
Swing the axe at the empty spot: no more wood (the tree is spent); pick another tree.
Note: the stump footprint still blocks walking (kinematic statics untouched — doc 05's concern).
